materials.specification: Concept elucidation of Consumer Price Index (CPI) and GDP Deflator definitions and differences; depth_floor: L3
Positive instance illustrating the concept.
Contrasting case; boundary discrimination.
Named confusion + reconciliation move from KM misconceptions.
Table with statements to classify as CPI or GDP Deflator related; includes exemplar rows and hint columns; depth_floor: L3
Blank classification table for learner to complete independently; depth_floor: L3
≥4 criteria-linked self-check items verifying correct classification and understanding; repair instructions if any check fails; depth_floor: L3

transition_chains.mechanism: ≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 8→9→10

materials.specification: Explicit operational rules and process for CPI inflation rate calculation using weighted averages; depth_floor: L3
Stepwise CPI inflation rate calculation with visible intermediate results and decisions; depth_floor: L3
Practice table with price data for CPI inflation calculation; includes exemplar rows and hints; depth_floor: L3
Blank practice table for independent CPI inflation rate calculation; depth_floor: L3
≥4 criteria-linked self-check items verifying correct calculation steps and results; repair instructions if any check fails; depth_floor: L3
Rework after audit failure.
Prompts for learner to apply CPI inflation calculation to own household or context with ≥80 words target; depth_floor: L3

transition_chains.mechanism: ≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 4→5→6
≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 6→7→9

materials.specification: Operational definitions of distribution, adaptation, and time-horizon lenses for analysing inflation impact; depth_floor: L3
Explanation of relationships between fixed-income/variable-income households and purchasing power under inflation; depth_floor: L3
Stepwise model of intellectual or procedural move.
Table with partial exemplar rows for comparing inflation impact on households; includes hint columns and scoring guide; depth_floor: L3
Partial attempt with fading support — distinct from independent.
Blank analysis table for independent household inflation impact analysis; depth_floor: L3
≥4 criteria-linked self-check items verifying completeness, justification, and analytical reasoning; repair instructions if any check fails; depth_floor: L3
Prompts for applying analysis lenses to learner's own or hypothetical household with ≥80 words target; depth_floor: L3

transition_chains.mechanism: ≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 5→7→8
≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 8→9→10

materials.specification: Learner constructs viewpoints; pause-and-write required.
Text or modelling note presenting ≥3 explicit evaluation criteria dimensions for household strategies; depth_floor: L3
Learner weights or prioritises criteria for the case.
Contrast of weak versus strong household strategy evaluation reasoning; depth_floor: L3
Productive uncertainty or trade-off tension prompts.
Partial completion with hint scaffolding; learner supplies justifications.
Full learner attempt without model-answer copy path.
Defended recommendation or comparative judgement.
≥4 criteria-linked self-audit items for evaluation completeness, justification, verification, and transfer readiness; repair instructions if any check fails; depth_floor: L3
Prompts for applying evaluation criteria and judgement to learner's own or hypothetical household strategy with ≥80 words target; depth_floor: L3

transition_chains.mechanism: ≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 3→5→10
≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; T4: judgement precedes transfer and reflection (38I order may interleave verification)
≥1 obligation (OBL-M/C/T) per chain function; no merge; plan indices 9→11→12
